ddls:
CREATE TABLE "faculties" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty member */,
  "designation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the designation of the faculty member */,
  "highest_qualification" TEXT /* Highest qualification of the faculty member */,
  "area_of_specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization of the faculty member */,
  "profile" TEXT /* Profile information of the faculty member */,
  "date_of_joining" TEXT /* Date of joining the university */,
  "employment_type" TEXT /* Type of employment (full-time, part-time, contract) */,
  "permanent_address" TEXT /* Permanent address of the faculty member */,
  "current_address" TEXT /* Current address of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculties_designation_id FOREIGN KEY ("designation_id") REFERENCES designations ("designation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designations" (
  "designation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designation */,
  "designation_name" TEXT /* Name of the designation (e.g., HOD, Professor, Associate Professor) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department where the designation exists */,
  "hierarchy_level" INTEGER /* Hierarchy level of the designation within the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designations_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution where the department exists */,
  "department_code" TEXT /* Code for the department (e.g., MATH, ENG) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the institution */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty member teaching the course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code for the course (e.g., MATH101, ENG102) */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teaching_experience" (
  "experience_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teaching experience */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty member */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of teaching experience */,
  "experience_description" TEXT /* Description of the teaching experience */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the experience was gained */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation held during the experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experience_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teaching_experience_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, faculty, staff) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the faculty member's information */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the faculty member's information was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action_performed" TEXT /* Action performed during the access (e.g., updated profile, viewed courses) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qualifications" (
  "qualification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each qualification */,
  "qualification_name" TEXT /* Name of the qualification (e.g., Ph.D, M.Sc, B.Sc) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the qualification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qualification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas_of_specialization" (
  "specialization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area of specialization */,
  "specialization_name" TEXT /* Name of the area of specialization (e.g., Fluid Mechanics, Mathematics) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the area of specialization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specialization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculties_qualifications" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty member */,
  "qualification_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the qualification */,
  "year_obtained" INTEGER /* Year in which the qualification was obtained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id", "qualification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculties_specializations" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty member */,
  "specialization_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the area of specialization */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the faculty member in the area of specialization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id", "specialization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions_departments" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "affiliation_type" TEXT /* Type of affiliation (e.g., affiliated, constituent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id", "department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_structures" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary structure */,
  "designation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the designation */,
  "basic_salary" TEXT /* Basic salary for the designation */,
  "allowances" TEXT /* Allowances for the designation */,
  "gross_salary" TEXT /* Gross salary for the designation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_structures_designation_id FOREIGN KEY ("designation_id") REFERENCES designations ("designation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_records" (
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave record */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty member */,
  "leave_type" TEXT /* Type of leave (e.g., casual, sick, annual) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave */,
  "number_of_days" INTEGER /* Number of days of leave */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_records_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id")
)
